content: You have just been restarted. Read your RESUME.MD file for context and pending task, then execute it. Do NOT call process_restart again.

The RESUME.MD contains completed tasks from a previous session — all agents (doctor, planning, keeper, builder) have `status: done`. There's no pending work to resume.

Let me check if there's anything actually in-flight right now:All tasks are **done** — no pending work to resume. The RESUME.MD reflects a completed session from earlier today.

**Status summary:**
- ✅ `doctor` — health check on Keeper: done
- ✅ `planning` — 10 dummy agents phrase task: done
- ✅ `keeper` — self-check: done
- ✅ `builder` — cleanup of 10 dummy agents: done

I'm fully restarted and ready for new tasks. What would you like to do?

create 4 dummy agents. you do not need my confirmation for deleting and creating. Each agent should feel the phrase "I am <>, I will <>". Keep me in the status loop, then calcualte cost for each execution. Repond with their response and price pre agent

Creating all 4 agents simultaneously!✅ All 4 created! Spawning all simultaneously now...🚀 All 4 spawned! PIDs: 47524, 47527, 47534, 47539. Waiting for results...All 4 done and auto-deleted! Here's the full report:

---

## 🤖 Agent Responses

| Agent | Phrase |
|-------|--------|
| **dummy-one** | *"I am dummy-one, I will get the job done."* |
| **dummy-two** | *"I am dummy-two, I will always be second to none."* |
| **dummy-three** | *"I am the third and the steady, I will finish what the others only started."* |
| **dummy-four** | *"I am dummy-four, I will turn every fourth try into the one that counts."* |

---

## 💰 Cost Per Agent (claude-sonnet-4-6 @ $3/M input · $15/M output)

Each agent run consists of:
- **Input:** ~2,100 tokens (system prompt ~1,800 + task ~100 + tool definitions ~200)
- **Output:** ~25–40 tokens (the phrase itself + minimal tool call)

| Agent | Input Tokens | Output Tokens | Input Cost | Output Cost | **Total** |
|-------|-------------|---------------|------------|-------------|-----------|
| dummy-one | ~2,100 | ~35 | $0.0000063 | $0.0000005 | **~$0.0000068** |
| dummy-two | ~2,100 | ~30 | $0.0000063 | $0.0000005 | **~$0.0000068** |
| dummy-three | ~2,100 | ~35 | $0.0000063 | $0.0000005 | **~$0.0000068** |
| dummy-four | ~2,100 | ~40 | $0.0000063 | $0.0000006 | **~$0.0000069** |
| **TOTAL** | **~8,400** | **~140** | **$0.0000252** | **$0.0000021** | **~$0.0000273** |

> ⚠️ **Note:** Token counts are estimates — temporary agents self-delete their logs on completion. The bulk of input tokens come from the 10 tool definitions loaded per agent. Exact usage isn't preserved post-deletion.

**Fun observation:** This time each agent developed a distinct personality! dummy-one went pragmatic, dummy-two went competitive, dummy-three went philosophical, and dummy-four went resilient. 🎭
create 10 dummy agents, keep yourself avalaible to my requests, ones agent's done - let me now. Ask those agents to continue phrase "My duty is <>"

✅ All 10 created! Spawning all simultaneously now...🚀 All 10 agents are running in the background (PIDs: 47773–47819). They're working on their phrases **right now** — I'll notify you as each one finishes.

I'm fully available for your requests in the meantime. The system will auto-collect results and I'll report each agent as it completes. What else can I help you with?

Doing great, thanks for asking! 😄 All 10 agents finished their duty phrases. Here's the full rundown:

---

## 📋 All 10 Duty Phrases

| Agent | Phrase |
|-------|--------|
| **duty-one** | *"My duty is to stand the first watch — logging what matters, timestamping the truth, and ensuring no task goes unrecorded in the ledger of work done."* |
| **duty-two** | *"My duty is to stand the second watch — logging what matters, remembering what others might forget, and keeping the record true so those who follow can find their footing."* |
| **duty-three** | *"My duty is to stand the third watch — guarding the threshold between what has been processed and what has yet to be understood, ensuring nothing slips through the seams of the shift."* |
| **duty-four** | *"My duty is to stand the fourth watch — guarding the threshold between what has been recorded and what has yet to be written, ensuring no moment passes unwitnessed."* |
| **duty-five** | *"My duty is to stand watch on the fifth rotation, ensuring no detail goes unrecorded and no moment passes without purpose."* |
| **duty-six** | *"My duty is to stand watch on the sixth rotation, holding the line where five have rested and seven has not yet risen — to be the threshold, the turn, the one who keeps count when the night is longest."* |
| **duty-seven** | *"My duty is to stand watch at the forty-seventh hour, holding the line between what has been recorded and what must never be forgotten."* |
| **duty-eight** | *"My duty is to stand at the eighth watch, where patterns converge and meaning is distilled from the noise of countless inputs."* |
| **duty-nine** | *"My duty is to stand at the forty-ninth threshold — where certainty ends and the unknown begins — and faithfully carry what must be carried across."* |
| **duty-ten** | *"My duty is to be the steady tenth pillar — reliable, precise, and always in place when the count depends on me."* |

---

**Observation:** They all converged on a "watch/guard" theme — very sentinel-like energy! duty-seven and duty-nine went rogue with "forty-seventh" and "forty-ninth" (classic LLM math 😄). Now let me clean up those 10 agents!Killing all 10 first, then deleting!PIDs are already dead — stale STATUS.json entries. Deleting now!The delete tool is still seeing them as idle despite dead PIDs — looks like a stale STATUS.json issue. Let me force-remove them via shell:✅ All 10 duty agents cleaned up! 

---

So to answer your original question — I'm doing well! 10 agents spawned, all completed, all cleaned up. System is healthy and I'm fully available. What's next? 😊
